children.name:
Message: unexpected HTTP error: 500 Internal Server Error, {"status":"fail","message":"Locking failed for [10.131.3.247]:5701, tx: ff0e1a68-bca0-4e4b-8ace-c3414bd2c720, current state: ClusterStateManager{stateLockRef=LockGuard{lockOwner=[10.131.3.247]:5701, lockOwnerId='6c9fca7c-b853-439d-9ece-2f0f2a3442bc', lockExpiryTime=1658568699595}, state=ACTIVE}"}
Expected
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
not to equal
    <v1alpha1.HotBackupState>: Failure
[It] Hazelcast CR with Persistence feature enabled Should successfully restore from external backup using Azure bucket [hz_persistence, slow]

Timed out after 20.001s.
Expected
    <types.MapConfig>: {
        InMemoryFormat: 0,
        BackupCount: 1,
        AsyncBackupCount: 0,
        TimeToLiveSeconds: 0,
        MaxIdleSeconds: 0,
        MaxSize: 0,
        MaxSizePolicy: 0,
        ReadBackupData: false,
        EvictionPolicy: 2,
        MergePolicy: "com.hazelcast.spi.merge.PutIfAbsentMergePolicy",
        Indexes: [],
    }
to satisfy predicate
    <func(types.MapConfig) bool>: 0x15bf960
[It] Hazelcast Map Config should update the map correctly [map, fast]
